tagline: The world's first real-time weight-based inventory management solution
whatTheySell: IoT smart scales and sensors that track inventory automatically by weight — no manual scanning, no barcodes, no human data entry. Integrates with existing ERP, WMS, and POS systems.
idealPartner: IT resellers and MSPs that already serve warehouses, manufacturers, distributors, or physical goods businesses and have hardware deployment capability
avoidVerticals: Pure software VARs with no hardware experience
